name: AR.IO Network
description: Ar.io is a data infrastructure solution for long-term access. We help enterprises, institutions, and platforms ensure that critical information remains accessible, verifiable, and intact over time — even as systems, providers, technologies, or attacks disrupt the environments around them. Ar.io infrastructure is designed for data that must outlast outages, migrations, vendor changes, and product cycles, without relying on recurring subscriptions or centralized points of failure.
